summary: Comprehensive testing of Carbon Tracker GHG Protocol application completed. All 29 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing verified all major features: Authentication (login, register, forgot password), Dashboard (3 tabs with charts), Data Entry (scope categories, GuidedEntryModal), Products (lifecycle emissions), Emission Factors (1190 factors), Fiscal Years (2024-2029), and Admin Panel (4 tabs: Factors, Subcategories, Users, Export).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Application fully functional. Backend tests cover: Auth (login, current user), Dashboard (summary, KPIs, fiscal comparison, scope breakdown), Activities (list, pagination), Products (list, details, sales, emission profiles), Emission Factors (list, search, by category), Reference Data (categories, subcategories), Fiscal Years, Admin Panel (users, subcategories, V2 factors), Export (full, emission factors, reference data), Objectives (get, trajectory, recommendations). Frontend verified: Login/Register/Forgot Password flows, Dashboard with 3 tabs and charts, Data Entry with GuidedEntryModal, Products page, Emission Factors page (1190 factors), Exercices page (2024-2029), Admin panel with 4 tabs.

authentication.login: PASS - Returns token and user info

dashboard.suivi_de_saisie: PASS - Shows activities count, products, categories, progression
dashboard.resultats: PASS - Shows emissions totals, per employee, per kCHF, year-over-year variation, charts
dashboard.objectifs: PASS - Shows SBTi 2035 objective with Scope 1&2 and Scope 3 targets, trajectory chart

data_entry.scope_tabs: PASS - Scope 1, 2, 3 Amont, 3 Aval tabs visible
data_entry.categories: PASS - Combustion mobile, Combustion fixe visible
data_entry.guided_modal: PASS - 4-step flow: subcategory → unit → factor → quantity

products.list: PASS - Shows CNC 5 product with lifecycle emissions
products.emission_profiles: PASS - API returns default and custom profiles
products.sales: PASS - API returns sales with sale_id

emission_factors.multi_impact: PASS - V2 factors with scope2 and scope33 impacts

fiscal_years.status_badges: PASS - En cours, Clôturé, Rectifié, Actuel badges

admin_panel.subcategories_tab: PASS - 89 subcategories with N-N category relationships
admin_panel.users_tab: PASS - 11 users with role management (Promouvoir/Retirer admin)
admin_panel.export_tab: PASS - Export options with fiscal year filters
